text.title: Communications Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Are there ≥3 stakeholder segments needing distinct comms?

conclusion.verdict: Author comms plan with channel × segment matrix

branch.when: multi_segment == true AND comms_plan_present == true AND crisis_path_named == false
multi_segment == true AND comms_plan_present == true AND crisis_path_named == true

example.trace: multi_segment=true → comms_plan_present=true → crisis_path_named=true → weekly status ships on time.
